OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Trinity Management Services is present. Represented by Jackie Lopez.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Salamh Alsuttamy is present.
Attorney, Mikael A. Abye is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elam Lambert, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of November 25, 2013 is vacated.
